label: Resend Contact Form
summary: Server-rendered contact form that submits to a Next.js Route Handler and sends the message as an email via Resend. Client component owns the form state + UX feedback (loading / success / error); server route owns the API call + validation. Designed to degrade gracefully when RESEND_API_KEY is missing — the route returns 503 with a clear message and the form shows a 'configure email to enable submissions' state.

envVars.purpose: Server-side Resend authentication. Find it in the Resend dashboard under API Keys. Route returns 503 with a clear message when missing so F3 build does not crash.
From-address used in outgoing emails. Must be a verified domain in Resend (e.g. 'Site <noreply@yourdomain.com>'). Same 503-fallback as RESEND_API_KEY.
Inbox that receives form submissions. Free-form email address; Resend does not need to verify it. Same 503-fallback as RESEND_API_KEY.
